mapper.sql: t.id, t.contract_id, t.order_id, t.contract_no, t.contract_type, t.version_no, t.contract_status, t.sign_mode, t.sign_effective_rule, t.file_url, t.external_contract_no, t.generate_time, t.sign_time, t.effective_time, t.invalid_time, t.invalid_reason, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_contract t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_contract t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_contract t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_contract ( contract_id, order_id, contract_no, contract_type, version_no, contract_status, sign_mode, sign_effective_rule, file_url, external_contract_no, generate_time, sign_time, effective_time, invalid_time, invalid_reason, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{contractId}, #{orderId}, #{contractNo}, #{contractType}, #{versionNo}, #{contractStatus}, #{signMode}, #{signEffectiveRule}, #{fileUrl}, #{externalContractNo}, #{generateTime}, #{signTime}, #{effectiveTime}, #{invalidTime}, #{invalidReason}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_contract ( contract_id, order_id, contract_no, contract_type, version_no, contract_status, sign_mode, sign_effective_rule, file_url, external_contract_no, generate_time, sign_time, effective_time, invalid_time, invalid_reason, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.contractId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.contractNo}, #{item.contractType}, #{item.versionNo}, #{item.contractStatus}, #{item.signMode}, #{item.signEffectiveRule}, #{item.fileUrl}, #{item.externalContractNo}, #{item.generateTime}, #{item.signTime}, #{item.effectiveTime}, #{item.invalidTime}, #{item.invalidReason}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_contract t SET
t.contract_status = #{contractStatus},
t.version_no = #{versionNo},
t.file_url = #{fileUrl},
t.sign_time = #{signTime},
t.effective_time = #{effectiveTime},
t.invalid_time = #{invalidTime},
t.invalid_reason = #{invalidReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_contract t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
